description: Compute Circular Tank Geometry from Field Survey. Using the survey dataset 'refinery_site.csv' on the Desktop, identify the three points coded 'TANK_01' in TopoCal. Construct a circle through these points and record its CenterX, CenterY, and Radius in 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\tank_geometry.txt' using the specified format. Save the resulting drawing to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\tank_model.dxf'.
